name: ListMembers
description: Get members of a Twitter/X list using network interception with auto-scroll

argument.script: async (globalVars) => { const response = globalVars.response; const prev = globalVars.extractData || []; const seenIds = prev.filter(u => !u._isTerminated).map(u => u.id); const seen = new Set(seenIds); const members = []; let isTerminated = false; try { const d = JSON.parse(response.body); const insts = d?.data?.list?.members_timeline?.timeline?.instructions || []; for (const inst of insts) { if (inst.type === 'TimelineTerminateTimeline' && inst.direction === 'Bottom') { isTerminated = true; continue; } for (const e of inst.entries || []) { const content = e?.content; const entryId = e?.entryId || ''; if (entryId.startsWith('cursor-')) continue; const user = content?.itemContent?.user_results?.result; if (!user) continue; const id = user?.rest_id || user?.id; if (!id || seen.has(id)) continue; seen.add(id); const legacy = user?.legacy || {}; const core = user?.core || {}; members.push({ id: String(id), username: core?.screen_name || legacy?.screen_name || '', name: core?.name || legacy?.name || '', bio: legacy?.description || '', followers: legacy?.followers_count || 0, following: legacy?.friends_count || 0, verified: user?.is_blue_verified || legacy?.verified || false, url: 'https://x.com/' + (core?.screen_name || legacy?.screen_name || '') }); } } if (isTerminated) members.push({ _isTerminated: true }); return members; } catch (e) { return []; } }

async (globalVars) => { const limit = {{ limit }} || 20; const maxScrolls = 20; const data = globalVars.extractData || []; if (data.some(d => d._isTerminated)) return false; const members = data.filter(d => !d._isTerminated); if (members.length >= limit) return false; globalVars.loopCount = (globalVars.loopCount || 0) + 1; if (globalVars.loopCount > maxScrolls) return false; const modal = document.querySelector('[aria-modal="true"]'); if (modal) { const scrollable = modal.querySelector('[data-viewportview="true"]') || modal.querySelector('section[aria-label]') || modal; scrollable.scrollBy(0, 10000); } else { window.scrollBy(0, 10000); } return {loopCount: globalVars.loopCount}; }
(globalVars) => { const limit = {{ limit }} || 20; globalVars.extractData = (globalVars.extractData || []).filter(d => !d._isTerminated).slice(0, limit); return globalVars; }

variables.name: list_id
variables.help: List ID to fetch members from
